hooks.command: jq -c 'if ((.tool_input.file_path // "") | endswith(".go")) then {"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":("Drift contract: " + .tool_input.file_path + " was modified. docs/ARCHITECTURE.md owns this file — update it to reflect the change and bump its last_verified date in the same commit. If a verb was added/removed/renamed, update the README.md verb table too.")}} else empty end' 2>/dev/null || true
